author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: conv_f32/f64 (with stride/padding/dilation), avgpool_f32/f64, maxpool_f32/f64. Best approach: use MPSCNNConvolution / MPSCNNPoolingAverage / MPSCNNPoolingMax from the Metal Performance Shaders CNN framework rather than custom MSL.
